emails.subject: Re: Raymond James & others ready for execution
emails.subject_base: Raymond James & others ready for execution
emails.body: Re: Raymond James others ready for execution Cheryl: Should you have any SEC issues (whether these are reps or forms to be completed, you should check with Travis or Lance (or anyone suggested by them). As you may know, ENA has an affiliated registered broker-dealer (and that fact could be pertinent in some type of rep). Thanks. 03/16/2001 02:02 PM Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Cheryl Nelson@ENRON Cheryl Nelson@ENRON 03/16/2001 02:02 PM 03/16/2001 02:02 PM Sent by: Cheryl Nelson@ENRON

emails.subject: Re: Raymond James & others ready for execution

emails.body: I think I have this under control it is basically the same long drill I did for Trutta. When everything is done, I'll doublecheck with one of them to make sure nothing is undone. Thanx. Cheryl Nelson Senior Counsel EB3816 (713) 345-4693 Sara Shackleton@ECT 03/16/2001 02:16 PM
